business_rule.name: Auto Calculate Fee
business_rule.description: Automatically calculates incident fee based on damage type and level

business_rule.name: Notify Library on Incident
business_rule.description: Sends notification to library staff when new incident is created

business_rule.name: Close Incident on Payment
business_rule.description: Automatically closes incident when payment is recorded

business_rule.name: Validate Incident Data
business_rule.description: Validates required incident fields before saving

business_rule.name: Set Priority by Damage
business_rule.description: Sets incident priority based on damage level and book value
